Product Name: Whitehaven White Wine Sauvignon Blanc Marlborough 2018 - 375 Ml
Product Description: Whitehaven Sauvignon Blanc wine captures bright citrus flavors of grapefruit and lemongrass in this crisp, refreshing Sauvignon Blanc. Superbly structured and balanced, aromas and flavors of fresh-snipped greens and warm pear nectar blend with notes of tropical fruit. Each glass boasts the long, clean finish of classic Sauvignon Blanc from Marlborough, New Zealand. This 375ml bottle equals 2 glasses and has a easy to open screw cap. | Bright, crisp and refreshing | Notes of citrus, grapefruit and lemongrass | From Marlborough, New Zealand | Easy to open screw cap - No wine opener needed | Smaller 375ml bottle = 2 glasses

Product Name: Neyers Chardonnay Carneros District White Wine Bottle - 750 Ml
Product Description: Neyers Carneros District Chardonnay is a tasty and attractive white wine loaded with tropical fruit and exotic flavors. This medium-to full-bodied dry white wine showcases a lovely aroma that the French call ‘Noisette’ after the hazelnut character it resembles. This award-winning California wine earned 92 points from James Suckling. Pair this white wine Chardonnay with your favorite fish and seafood dishes for a delicious meal. The traditional winemaking practices have done much to enhance the charm and maximize the complexity of the vintage. This is a Chardonnay wine that will improve in the bottle for a decade or more, while it provides an attractive drinking experience along the way. All Neyers wines are made with an eye for quality and a deep-seated passion for excellence. One 750mL wine bottle of Neyers Chardonnay White Wine, 13.8% alcohol by volume. | Dry white wine with a lovely aroma that the French call ‘Noisette’ after the hazelnut character it resembles | Smooth and luscious dry wine that is soft and complex | This white wine earned 92 points from James Suckling for the 2018 vintage | Enjoy this wine with your favorite fish and seafood dishes | Sourced from Napa Valley, California

Product Name: Clone 7 Paso Robles Cabernet Savignon Wine - 750 Ml
Product Description: Red wine. Cabernet Sauvignon from select gravelly, clay loam vineyards common to the east side of Paso Robles AVA where warm days and cool, foggy nights produce layered, full-bodied wine with depth and minerality. Alc by Vol 14.2% 28.4 Cellared and Bottled by DC Flynt MW Selections, American Canyon, CA.

Product Name: Wonderland Sauvignon Blanc - 750 Ml
Product Description: New Zealand has a vast diversity of climates and topography ranging from towering mountains to lush tropical forests, gorgeous beaches to pristine vineyards. It is a magical wonderland. Marlborough Wine country benefits from coastal influences where cooler weather creates a long growing season allowing grapes to reach full ripeness. Our Sauvignon Blanc is delicious with bright citrus aromas and refreshing flavors of grapefruit, kiwi and lime. Alc. by vol 13%. 26 Produced and bottled for Truett Hurst, Marlborough, New Zealand.

Product Name: Apothic Red Blend Red Wine - 750 Ml
Product Description: Apothic Red is a complex and inviting wine that offers a symphony of flavors. This rich blend boasts notes of dark berries, hints of mocha, and a touch of spice. Perfect for gathering with a group of friends at home, it pairs wonderfully with grilled meats, aged cheeses, and spiced desserts. Whether it's complementing a hearty dinner or enhancing the warmth of after-dinner conversation, let Apothic Red be your companion, making every moment vibrant and lively. | One (1) 750 mL wine bottle of Apothic Red Wine Blend | Blend of Merlot, Cabernet Sauvignon, Syrah and Zinfandel grapes | Smooth, medium-bodied red wine blend with notes of dark berries, hints of mocha,  and a touch of spice | Enjoy drinking a glass of this red wine at room temperature | Pairs perfectly with a variety of foods like tomato-based pasta dishes or cheeses

Product Name: Orin Swift Sign Of The Times Wine - 750 ML
Product Description: Our winemaking team started with a base of Cabernet Sauvignon and then bolstered the blend with Petite Sirah and Grenache. An opaque fuchsia core and a crimson laced rim introduces 2023 Sign of the Times. Pleasing aromatics with notes of black plum, black currant and dark chocolate abound. The palate is plush with blue fruits, cassis, licorice and sweet oak. Supple tannins keep the wine approachable in its youth while the balancing acidity gives it some aging potential. | One (1) 750ml bottle of Orin Swift Sign of the Times Red Blend | Pleasing aromatics with notes of black plum, black currant and dark chocolate | A base of Cabernet Sauvignon and then bolstered the blend with Petite Sirah and Grenache

Product Name: Bonanza Chardonnay Lot 1 Sc Wine - 750 ML
Product Description: Bonanza is about enjoying the simple pleasures of life. It started with Cabernet Sauvignon, and now we are introducing Bonanza Chardonnay, a wine that is also a delicious accompaniment to lunch or dinner. This Chardonnay is not typical, meaning it is not made in a buttery, oaky style. Instead, it is bright and fresh, with a vibrancy that brings out the natural goodness of the varietal. Sourced from California vineyards, Bonanza Chardonnay is highly enjoyable and a true expression of the Bonanza name.

Product Name: Beringer Knights Valley Cabernet Sauvignon Red Wine - 750 Ml
Product Description: Beringer Knights Valley Cabernet Sauvignon is a full-bodied red wine with intense dark fruit flavors. Highly concentrated, this smooth Cabernet Sauvignon red wine offers fine-grained tannins and distinctive oak notes, finishing with mineral accents and a lively lift. Enjoyable now or after years of aging. As California’s longest continuously operating winery, Beringer has been defining Napa Valley winemaking since 1876. Its historic Knights Valley estate vineyard is sustainably farmed, and Cabernet Sauvignon grapes are hand-picked for this elegantly structured red wine. Like all Beringer wines, this 750 ml bottle of Cabernet Sauvignon is best enjoyed with friends. | One 750 ml glass bottle of cabernet sauvignon wine from knights valley, california, containing approximately five 5-oz servings of wine | Elegant and supple knights valley, california, cabernet sauvignon red wine offers smooth, juicy, dark red fruit accented with dark chocolate and herb notes. expansive and juicy dark cherry and berry flavors are rounded with smooth oak notes and a generous finish. | Enjoy this red wine paired with prime rib, grilled meats, or beef brisket with roasted mushrooms | 93 - 94 points ratings by james suckling: 2018 - 2021 vintages | 14.8% alcohol by volume, 750 ml wine bottle

Product Name: Caymus Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon 21 Wine - 750 Ml
Product Description: Introduced by Caymus Vineyards with the 2021 vintage, this wine is a California-appellation Cabernet Sauvignon – supple, dark and rich, bearing the signature hallmarks of Caymus. It is sourced from sites throughout the state which feature climatic conditions, soils and topography that are ideally suited to Cabernet. This project stems from excitement over California’s diverse vineyard land, often in lesser-known areas, with the potential to produce exceptional Cabernet. You can watch a video and learn more by scanning the QR code on the back label of this wine. | SOURCING: Places from Pasa Robles to lesser-known areas in Lake, Monterey and San Benito Counties can produce great Cab | STYLE: Signature style of Cabernet - dark and lush, with ripe fruit and luxuious tannins | Caymus began in Napa Valley, and that will always be our home. However, there is much to be excited about in a broader stretch of California

Product Name: Casillero del Diablo Wine Carmenere - 750 Ml
Product Description: This is the story of the legend whose protagonist gave our wines a unique name. Casillero del Diablo: a portfolio destined to cross borders and become one of the most famous Chilean wine brands in the world.

Product Name: Poliziano Rosso di Montepulciano Wine - 750 Ml
Product Description: Poliziano began in 1961 when Dino Carletti, moved by a romantic vision for his native land and its centuries of wine tradition, acquired the first parcel of 22 hectares around the area of Montepulciano. The name of the winery is a tribute to this indeed. In Italian, in fact, a native of Montepulciano is called a ‘Poliziano’, of which probably the most well-known in history is the humanist and poet Angelo Ambrogini (1454-1494), nicknamed “Poliziano”, represented in the logo. | Tasting Notes Flinty crushed giner, citrus, tangerine peel and apricot lead the way, with white pepper, sweet spices and dried pineapple to follow.  | Country/State Italy | Region Italy | Appellation Montepulciano | Varietal Sangiovese | Awards JD 90 | Scores WE:90-2020;

Product Name: Bogle Vineyards Phantom Wine - 750 Ml
Product Description: Full-bodied and jammy, Phantom's origins of Petite Sirah and Zinfandel emerge from the glass. Spicy pepper and juniper tantalize your senses, while black plums and blueberries emerge on the palate. Notes of pipe tobacco and clove settle around the finish, long and lingering, like Delta fog. | Aged 28 months in American oak | 51.5% Petite Sirah, 48.5% Zinfandel | Gluten free | Vegan friendly

Product Name: Brady Vineyard Cabernet Franc California Red Wine - 750 Ml
Product Description: La Gioiosa is one of Italy's leading producers of Prosecco, and takes its name from an ancient local motto 'Marca gioiosa et amorosa', meaning 'Joyous and amorous March', The March of Treviso being an antiquated name for the province in which this wine is made. Pale straw yellow with a fine and persistent mousse. Aromas are lightly floral and fruity, hinting at blossom intermingling with ripe apple. Off-dry and refreshing. Chill well and enjoy on its own or with steamed fish and shellfish dishes.

Product Name: Hanna Russian River Valley Chardonnay Wine - 750 Ml
Product Description: Hanna's Chardonnay from Russian River Valley is a taste of California's coastal elegance. It's a wine that exudes warmth, vibrancy, and the beauty of Sonoma County's vineyards.

Product Name: Decoy Limited Alexander Valley Cabernet Sauvignon Red Wine - 750 Ml
Product Description: Est. 1985. Established in 1985 by legendary vintners Dan and Margaret Duckhorn, our roots run deep at Decoy. Building on our rich winemaking heritage, we invite you to experience Decoy Limited. Crafted using grapes from some of the most acclaimed Alexander Valley vineyards, including our own estate properties, this is the ultimate expression of Decoy Cabernet Sauvignon, displaying robust layers of blackberry, plum, dark chocolate and violets, with French oak-inspired hints of vanilla and spice. The duckhorn portfolio. DecoyWines.com. To learn about our Duckhorn portfolio of wines: (707) 945-1812. DecoyWines.com. Alc 14.5% by vol. 29 Cellared and Bottled by Decoy, Healdsburg, CA.

Product Name: Cosme Little James Basket Press - 750 ML
Product Description: White wine. Blending Viognier and Sauvignon Blanc is rare, because the two grapes are traditionally grown in different regions - except in Languedoc. In these cool hills, the southern varietal Sauvignon Blanc (50%) and northern varietal Viognier (50%) immerse themselves with the Limestone soils, delivering complexity and freshness. Their marriage helps bring a subtle balance delivering a fresh wine with aromas of grapeduit, apricot and lychee. www.saintcosme.com. Alc. 12.5% by vol. 25 Product of France.

Product Name: Cinnabar Mercury Rising Red Wine - 750 Ml
Product Description: Mercury Rising is Cinnabar's proprietary red wine blend made from select California vineyards, which is fermented in small lots and aged for 18 months in French and American oak barrels. It is bright fruit aromas, luscious mouthfeel and lengthy finish make Mercury Rising the perfect choice for special occasions as well as everyday events.
